basicInfo.name: Nightmare Knox
basicInfo.flavor: Knox obtained immense power after awakening his Sword of the Underworld. He is now known as the Imperator of Purgatory.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 50% of Physical Attack plus 12% of the caster's Max HP 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 50% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Infernal Shield
Skill 1.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Effect Resist Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

Skill 2.name: Hell Strike
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Death. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Knight of Hell
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Death Effect Probability Boost. [Always Active]
 - Self
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 39% of the caster's Max HP. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)] [Once per Round]

profile.story:
A noble knight of Terra Kingdom, hailing from a family that served Kris's for generations.
While he once strived to become the Seat of Light, he was disheartened once he realized the gap between his abilities and Kris's, then fully gave up once his eyesight started to fail him.
When Knox was preparing to resign from the knights and return to his home, Kris came to him and asked Knox to serve him.
Kris praised Knox for being able to hold his own in a duel despite his failing eyesight, and he promised him that they would rise to glory together once Kris became the Seat of Light.
Knox went on to become Kris's right-hand man, leading the knights under Kris in his lord's absence.
However, he was killed as a part of Dellons's plot to pit Kris and Rudy against each other. Once Kris obtained the great demon's power, he brought Knox back to life.
As an undead, Knox is slowly starting to lose his human memories.
He still thinks that Rudy is the one that killed him. He lives his life for the sake of his lord Kris and for his own revenge against Rudy.
